title: Raccoon Removal in Pelham, Westchester | $900-$4,000
metaDescription: Professional raccoon removal services in Pelham, Westchester. Humane trapping, exclusion & cleanup. Licensed experts serving Pelham Manor & Pelham Bay. Call today for a free quote!
intro: Raccoons are a common wildlife problem in Pelham, where tree-lined neighborhoods and proximity to parks create ideal habitats for these nocturnal intruders. Our professional raccoon removal services protect Pelham homes and businesses from property damage, health risks, and the disturbances caused by raccoons nesting in attics, chimneys, and crawl spaces. Best Pest Control NYC offers humane, effective raccoon removal with comprehensive exclusion and prevention solutions tailored to Westchester properties.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of wildlife management experience to Pelham, combining humane trapping techniques with permanent exclusion solutions that address the root cause of raccoon intrusions. Our licensed technicians understand the unique challenges of Westchester properties and provide guaranteed results with transparent pricing and same-day emergency service availability.
localContext: Pelham's historic homes, mature oak and maple trees, and proximity to Shore Park and Pelham Bay Park make it particularly attractive to raccoon populations seeking shelter and food sources. The area's mix of early 20th-century residences with accessible attics and chimneys, combined with the wooded corridors along Hutchinson River Parkway, creates frequent wildlife encounters that require professional intervention.

faqs.question: How much does raccoon removal cost in Pelham?
faqs.answer: Raccoon removal in Pelham typically ranges from $900 to $4,000 depending on the severity of the infestation, number of raccoons, entry points requiring exclusion, and any necessary attic cleanup or damage repair. A single raccoon removal with basic exclusion starts around $900, while comprehensive services involving multiple animals, extensive damage repair, and full attic restoration can reach $4,000. We provide free inspections and detailed quotes before any work begins.

faqs.question: Are raccoons common in Pelham neighborhoods?
faqs.answer: Yes, raccoons are very common in Pelham due to the area's mature trees, parks, and older homes with accessible attics and chimneys. Neighborhoods near Shore Park, Pelham Bay Park, and the wooded areas along the Hutchinson River Parkway experience frequent raccoon activity, especially during spring when mothers seek denning sites for their young. The abundance of food sources from trash bins and the architectural features of historic Pelham homes make this area particularly attractive to raccoons.

faqs.question: What does the raccoon removal process involve?
faqs.answer: Our raccoon removal process begins with a thorough inspection of your Pelham property to identify entry points, assess damage, and locate raccoons. We then humanely trap and remove all raccoons, including babies if present during breeding season. After removal, we seal all entry points with durable materials to prevent re-entry, clean and sanitize affected areas, and repair any structural damage. We also provide recommendations for ongoing prevention and offer warranty protection on our exclusion work.

faqs.question: How quickly can you respond to a raccoon problem in Pelham?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and emergency raccoon removal services throughout Pelham and Westchester County. Our team understands that raccoons in your attic or walls require immediate attention, especially if they're causing noise disturbances, raising young, or creating health hazards. We typically respond within 2-4 hours for emergency calls and can schedule standard inspections within 24 hours. Contact us anytime for rapid response to your raccoon problem.
